P005.zh: 进行性排尿困难3年余，加重伴小便变红1月
P005.en: Progressive difficulty urinating for over 3 years, worsening with red urine for 1 month.
P005.openingZh: 医生，我排尿越来越费劲，最近一个月小便还会变红。
P005.openingEn: Doctor, it has been getting harder to urinate, and my urine has also turned red over the past month.

P009.zh: 突发右侧腰痛伴浓茶色尿半天
P009.en: Sudden right flank pain with dark tea-colored urine for half a day.
P009.openingZh: 医生，我右边腰突然痛得厉害，小便还是浓茶色，已经半天了。
P009.openingEn: Doctor, my right side suddenly started hurting badly, and my urine has been dark tea-colored for half a day.

HX-ADD-002.zh: 反复尿频伴小便变红半年
HX-ADD-002.en: Recurrent urinary frequency with red urine for half a year.
HX-ADD-002.openingZh: 医生，我这半年尿频反反复复，小便也会变红。
HX-ADD-002.openingEn: Doctor, for the past half year I have repeatedly needed to urinate more often, and my urine has also turned red.

HX-ADD-003.zh: 左腰隐痛伴小便变红1个月
HX-ADD-003.en: Red urine with dull left flank pain for 1 month.
HX-ADD-003.openingZh: 医生，我左边腰一直隐隐作痛，小便变红有一个月了。
HX-ADD-003.openingEn: Doctor, I have had a dull ache in my left side and red urine for a month.

HX-ADD-004.openingZh: 医生，我这三周小便断断续续变红，但排尿时不疼。
HX-ADD-004.openingEn: Doctor, my urine has turned red off and on for three weeks, but it does not hurt when I urinate.

HX-ADD-006.zh: 尿频、尿急、尿痛伴小便发红2天
HX-ADD-006.en: Urinary frequency, urgency, and pain with red-tinged urine for 2 days.
HX-ADD-006.openingZh: 医生，我这两天老想小便，又急又疼，尿也有点发红。
HX-ADD-006.openingEn: Doctor, for two days I have needed to urinate often and urgently, it hurts, and my urine looks a little red.

HX-ADD-007.zh: 发热、左腰痛伴尿频、尿痛3天
HX-ADD-007.en: Fever, left flank pain, urinary frequency, and painful urination for 3 days.
HX-ADD-007.openingZh: 医生，我发烧、左腰痛，还尿频尿痛，已经三天了。
HX-ADD-007.openingEn: Doctor, I have had a fever, pain in my left side, frequent urination, and pain when urinating for three days.

HX-ADD-009.zh: 尿频、尿痛伴小便发红1周
HX-ADD-009.en: Urinary frequency and pain with red-tinged urine for 1 week.
HX-ADD-009.openingZh: 医生，我这一周尿得频、尿的时候疼，尿色还有点发红。
HX-ADD-009.openingEn: Doctor, for a week I have been urinating often, it hurts, and my urine looks a little red.

HX-ADD-010.zh: 反复尿痛伴尿检发现血尿1年
HX-ADD-010.en: Recurrent painful urination with microscopic blood detected on urine tests for 1 year.
HX-ADD-010.openingZh: 医生，我这一年尿痛反反复复，尿检还总能查到血。
HX-ADD-010.openingEn: Doctor, the pain when I urinate has kept coming back for a year, and urine tests keep finding blood.

HX-ADD-011.zh: 右腰腹绞痛伴小便发红6小时
HX-ADD-011.en: Red-tinged urine with severe right flank and abdominal colic for 6 hours.
HX-ADD-011.openingZh: 医生，我右边腰和肚子绞着疼，小便有点发红，已经六个小时了。
HX-ADD-011.openingEn: Doctor, my right side and abdomen have been cramping badly, and my urine looks a little red; it has been six hours.

HX-ADD-012.en: Red-tinged urine with left flank pain for 1 day.
HX-ADD-012.openingZh: 医生，我左边腰痛了一天，小便看着有点发红。
HX-ADD-012.openingEn: Doctor, my left side has hurt for a day, and my urine looks a little red.

HX-ADD-013.zh: 排尿困难伴排尿末小便发红3个月
HX-ADD-013.en: Difficulty urinating with red urine at the end of urination for 3 months.
HX-ADD-013.openingZh: 医生，我这三个月排尿很费劲，快尿完时尿色会发红。
HX-ADD-013.openingEn: Doctor, I have had trouble urinating for three months, and the urine turns red near the end.

HX-ADD-014.zh: 反复发热、腰痛伴小便发红半年
HX-ADD-014.en: Recurrent fever and flank pain with red-tinged urine for half a year.
HX-ADD-014.openingZh: 医生，我这半年反复发烧、腰痛，小便也会发红。
HX-ADD-014.openingEn: Doctor, for the past half year I have repeatedly had fever and flank pain, and my urine also looks red.

HX-ADD-015.zh: 左侧腰腹痛伴小便发红1天
HX-ADD-015.en: Red-tinged urine with left flank and abdominal pain for 1 day.
HX-ADD-015.openingZh: 医生，我左边腰腹疼了一天，小便有点发红。
HX-ADD-015.openingEn: Doctor, my left side and abdomen have hurt for a day, and my urine looks a little red.

HX-ADD-016.zh: 排尿困难伴小便变红3天
HX-ADD-016.en: Difficulty urinating with red urine for 3 days.
HX-ADD-016.openingZh: 医生，我排尿一直费劲，这三天小便还变红了。
HX-ADD-016.openingEn: Doctor, I have trouble urinating, and my urine has also turned red over the past three days.

HX-ADD-017.en: Red urine for 1 day after catheterization.
HX-ADD-017.openingZh: 医生，我导尿以后小便变红了，已经一天了。
HX-ADD-017.openingEn: Doctor, my urine turned red after the catheter was placed, and it has been one day.

HX-ADD-018.zh: 排尿困难伴尿检发现血尿半年
HX-ADD-018.en: Difficulty urinating with microscopic blood detected on urine tests for half a year.
HX-ADD-018.openingZh: 医生，我排尿费劲有半年了，尿检还发现有血。
HX-ADD-018.openingEn: Doctor, I have had difficulty urinating for half a year, and urine tests have also found blood.

HX-ADD-019.zh: 咽痛后尿色呈浓茶色或可乐色2天
HX-ADD-019.en: Dark tea- or cola-colored urine for 2 days after a sore throat.
HX-ADD-019.openingZh: 医生，我咽痛以后尿变成了浓茶色，有两天了。
HX-ADD-019.openingEn: Doctor, after my sore throat my urine turned dark tea-colored, and it has been like this for two days.

HX-ADD-020.zh: 皮肤感染后茶色尿伴眼睑水肿1周
HX-ADD-020.en: Tea-colored urine with eyelid swelling for 1 week after a skin infection.
HX-ADD-020.openingZh: 医生，我皮肤感染以后尿呈茶色，眼皮也肿了一个星期。
HX-ADD-020.openingEn: Doctor, after a skin infection my urine became tea-colored, and my eyelids have been swollen for a week.

HX-ADD-021.zh: 体检反复发现尿检有血3年
HX-ADD-021.en: Microscopic blood repeatedly detected on health-check urine tests for 3 years.
HX-ADD-021.openingZh: 医生，我这三年体检尿检反复查到有血，但自己看不出来。
HX-ADD-021.openingEn: Doctor, health-check urine tests have repeatedly found blood for three years, but I cannot see any color change myself.

HX-ADD-023.zh: 泡沫尿、尿检发现血尿伴面部皮疹2周
HX-ADD-023.en: Foamy urine with microscopic blood detected on urine tests and a facial rash for 2 weeks.
HX-ADD-023.openingZh: 医生，我这两周尿里泡沫多，脸上起了皮疹，尿检还发现有血。
HX-ADD-023.openingEn: Doctor, for two weeks my urine has been foamy, I have had a rash on my face, and a urine test also found blood.

HX-ADD-024.en: One episode of red-tinged urine after a long-distance run.
HX-ADD-024.openingZh: 医生，我长跑以后有一次小便发红，休息后就好了。
HX-ADD-024.openingEn: Doctor, my urine looked red once after a long-distance run, and it cleared after I rested.

HX-ADD-025.zh: 经期体检发现尿潜血阳性1天
HX-ADD-025.en: Urine dipstick positive for blood during menstruation at a health check 1 day ago.
HX-ADD-025.openingZh: 医生，我经期体检时尿潜血阳性，刚发现一天。
HX-ADD-025.openingEn: Doctor, a health-check urine dipstick was positive for blood during my period one day ago.

HX-ADD-026.zh: 车祸后腰痛伴小便变红4小时
HX-ADD-026.en: Red urine with flank pain for 4 hours after a traffic accident.
HX-ADD-026.openingZh: 医生，我车祸撞到腰后小便变红了，已经四个小时。
HX-ADD-026.openingEn: Doctor, my urine turned red after my flank was hit in a traffic accident four hours ago.

HX-ADD-027.zh: 反复腰痛伴茶色或淡红色尿半年
HX-ADD-027.en: Recurrent flank pain with tea-colored or pale red urine for half a year.
HX-ADD-027.openingZh: 医生，我这半年腰痛反反复复，尿色有时像茶色、有时偏淡红。
HX-ADD-027.openingEn: Doctor, my flank pain has kept coming back for half a year, and my urine sometimes looks tea-colored and sometimes pale red.

HX-ADD-028.zh: 突发左腰痛伴小便变红1天
HX-ADD-028.en: Sudden left flank pain with red urine for 1 day.
HX-ADD-028.openingZh: 医生，我左边腰突然痛起来，小便也变红一天了。
HX-ADD-028.openingEn: Doctor, my left side suddenly started hurting, and my urine has been red for one day.

HX-ADD-030.zh: 体检发现尿检有血1个月
HX-ADD-030.en: Microscopic blood detected on health-check urine tests for 1 month.
HX-ADD-030.openingZh: 医生，我体检两次都说尿检有血，已经一个月了。
HX-ADD-030.openingEn: Doctor, two health-check urine tests have found blood over the past month.
